loan_contract_no.default: select max(loan_contract_no) from sc_lon_m_contract where loan_type = 'ส' and begining_of_contract >= sysdate - 3

root.sql: SELECT (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no as loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract as begining_of_contract ,extract ( day from ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) ) as begin_day , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'MONTH') as begin_month , extract ( year from ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) ) + 543 as begin_year , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as memname , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no as membership_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount as loan_approve_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ) as loan_approve_amount_thai , si_security_user.user_name as user_name , decode( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , 'ส' , sc_cnt_m_coop.assit_manager , sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name ) as manager_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.manager_name as manager_namecoll FROM sc_lon_m_contract, si_security_user, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer = si_security_user.user_id AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no AND sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AND sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type /*WHERE*/ -- AND sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'ส65000231' ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ASC

r_amnat_com_coll_loan_nest_haeder.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) as memname_guarantor , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no as membership_no_guarantor , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name as add_guarantor , sc_mem_m_member_address.telephone as tel_guarantor FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_member_address WHERE sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no AND sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' AND sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' /*WHERE*/ AND sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0} AND sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no = {1} ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no

r_amnat_com_coll_loan_nest_guarantor_1.sql: select seq_no ,memname_guarantor ,manager_name ,loan_contract_no ,collateral_no from ( SELECT rownum as seq_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) as memname_guarantor , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.manager_name , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no AND sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' /*WHERE*/ AND sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0} ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no ASC ) tb where tb.collateral_no <= 3 and tb.collateral_no = {1}

r_amnat_com_coll_loan_nest_guarantor_2.sql: select seq_no ,ref_own_no ,memname_guarantor ,manager_name ,loan_contract_no ,collateral_no from ( SELECT rownum as seq_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) as memname_guarantor , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.manager_name , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no AND sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' /*WHERE*/ AND sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0} ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no ASC ) tb where tb.collateral_no > 3 and tb.collateral_no = {1}

r_amnat_com_coll_loan_nest_footer.sql:
SELECT decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status , '1' , ( select sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename || sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.spouse_name || ' ' || sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.spouse_surname from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info ,sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code and sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) , sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status ) as spouse_name
, decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status , '1' , ( select sc_mem_m_ucf_ocupation.occupation_description from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info ,sc_mem_m_ucf_ocupation where sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.occupation_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_ocupation.occupation_code and sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) , sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status ) as spouse_occupation
, decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status , '1' , ( select salary_amount from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) , 0 ) as spouse_salary_amount
, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) as memname_guarantor
, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'SD') as begin_day , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'month') as begin_month , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'YYYY') as begin_year
FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_member_address , sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status WHERE sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status AND sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' AND sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no /*WHERE*/ AND sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0} and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no = {1} ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no
